name: ChowNow Restaurant Online Ordering API
what_it_does: ChowNow commission-free restaurant online ordering REST API for independent restaurants and small chains to manage direct online ordering, branded apps, and customer data without third-party marketplace commission fees. Enables AI agents to manage menu and item configuration for restaurant online ordering menu automation, handle order receipt and kitchen notification for restaurant order management automation, access customer order history and preferences for restaurant CRM and loyalty automation, retrieve order status and delivery tracking for restaurant order fulfillment automation, manage restaurant hours and availability for online ordering schedule automation, handle promotional offers and discount code management for restaurant marketing automation, access multi-location menu and order management for small chain restaurant automation, retrieve order analytics and revenue reporting for restaurant digital ordering performance automation, manage POS integration for restaurant order injection automation, and integrate ChowNow with POS systems (Aloha, Toast, Square) and third-party delivery for restaurant digital ordering ecosystem management.
use_cases: Processing direct orders from independent restaurant automation agents
Managing commission-free ordering from restaurant digital channel agents
Tracking customer ordering patterns from restaurant CRM agents
Syncing menus from restaurant management automation agents
not_for: Third-party marketplace discovery (use DoorDash, Grubhub, or Uber Eats)
Enterprise restaurant chains with dedicated ordering platforms
Ghost kitchen aggregation (use ItsaCheckmate or Ordermark)
best_when: An independent restaurant, local chain, or food service operator wanting AI agents to automate commission-free direct online ordering, customer data management, and menu synchronization without paying marketplace commissions to DoorDash or Uber Eats.
avoid_when: CUSTOMER DATA OWNERSHIP AND MARKETING CONSENT: Automated customer marketing via ChowNow using order history requires CAN-SPAM and TCPA compliance for email and SMS; ChowNow positions customer data ownership as a feature for direct restaurants; automated marketing without customer consent creates CAN-SPAM and TCPA violation for restaurant operators. ORDER INJECTION POS INTEGRATION DEPENDENCY: Automated order routing from ChowNow to restaurant POS requires active POS integration setup; automated order injection without verified POS connection creates manual order handling for kitchen staff; verify POS integration status before automated order workflow deployment. DELIVERY PROVIDER HANDOFF FOR LAST-MILE: ChowNow does not provide proprietary last-mile delivery; automated delivery order management requires ChowNow integration with DoorDash Drive, Uber Direct, or third-party delivery provider; automated delivery dispatch without delivery provider API integration creates manual coordination requirement.

auth.notes: ChowNow uses OAuth 2.0 and API key for restaurant and partner integrations. REST API with JSON. Los Angeles, California HQ. Founded 2011 by Chris Webb and Eric Jaffe. Private (~$100M raised, Shamrock Capital, Citi Ventures). Commission-free online ordering for independent restaurants. 20,000+ restaurant partners. Branded app and web ordering. POS integration (Aloha, Toast, Square, Lightspeed). Competes with Olo, Flipdish, and Tillster for restaurant digital ordering.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — monthly subscription for restaurant online ordering
pricing.paid_tiers: Monthly subscription per restaurant location; branded app tier for multi-location operators; no per-order commission
pricing.notes: Los Angeles CA. Private (~$100M raised). Founded 2011. Monthly subscription per location. No per-order commission. Branded app tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; menu and order queries throttled; webhooks for order and menu events

known_agent_gotchas: CUSTOMER OPT-IN MARKETING CONSENT REQUIRED: ChowNow customer email and phone data is restaurant-owned but automated marketing using this data requires CAN-SPAM compliant email opt-in and TCPA SMS consent; automated re-engagement campaigns without verified opt-in consent creates regulatory violation for restaurant operators; implement consent verification before automated marketing sequence

POS INTEGRATION ORDER INJECTION STATUS UNKNOWN: ChowNow POS integration status varies by restaurant and POS version; automated order injection to POS may silently fail for restaurants with inactive or misconfigured POS integration; implement order injection status monitoring and fallback to kitchen printer notification for restaurants without confirmed POS integration

MENU 86 ITEM REAL-TIME SYNC: ChowNow menu availability requires active sync to reflect real-time 86'd items from restaurant kitchen; automated online menu does not automatically reflect POS-level item unavailability; implement manual 86 trigger via ChowNow API or real-time POS-to-ChowNow menu sync to prevent customer orders for unavailable items

DELIVERY PROVIDER SURGE PRICING MISMATCH: ChowNow does not include proprietary delivery; automated delivery order dispatch via third-party delivery (DoorDash Drive, Uber Direct) may encounter surge pricing that differs from restaurant delivery fee configuration; automated delivery cost pass-through without surge price awareness creates restaurant delivery margin shortfall

ORDER WEBHOOK RETRY HANDLING: ChowNow order received webhooks may retry on delivery failure; automated kitchen notification or POS injection triggered by ChowNow webhook must implement idempotency on order ID to prevent duplicate kitchen tickets on webhook retry

MULTI-LOCATION MENU CONSISTENCY MANAGEMENT: ChowNow multi-location menu management allows per-location customization; automated menu updates to chain-wide items must specify location scope; automated chain-wide menu push that overwrites location-specific modifications creates unintended menu changes for locations with customized pricing or availability
agent_readiness.security_notes: Restaurant online ordering. PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US. Customer order history, PII, and restaurant transaction data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Restaurant ordering. PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US. Customer order, PII, and transaction data.
